snippet: The U.S. Census Bureau’s economic indicator surveys provide monthly and quarterly data that are timely, reliable, and offer comprehensive measures of the U.S. economy. These surveys provide a variety of statistics covering construction, housing, international trade, retail trade, wholesale trade, services and manufacturing. The survey data provide measures of the economic activity that allows analysis of economic performance and inform business investment and policy decisions. For information on
